skills.name: frontend-profile-selector
skills.summary: Selects the supported frontend application and rendering profile.

skills.name: typescript-client-sdk-generator
skills.summary: Generates typed TypeScript clients from approved REST, RPC, event, or webhook contracts.

skills.name: auth-session-ui-generator
skills.summary: Generates sign-in, sign-out, session, token refresh, tenant selection, and authorization-aware UI flows.

skills.name: form-validation-generator
skills.summary: Generates forms, field schemas, client validation, server-error mapping, accessibility, and optimistic concurrency handling.

skills.name: crud-table-detail-generator
skills.summary: Generates list, filter, sort, page, create, view, edit, and delete interfaces from approved resource contracts.

skills.name: dashboard-chart-generator
skills.summary: Generates KPI cards, charts, filters, drilldowns, freshness indicators, and accessible tabular alternatives.

skills.name: navigation-routing-permission-generator
skills.summary: Generates application shell, route tree, breadcrumbs, navigation, deep links, and permission-aware visibility.

skills.name: design-token-component-adapter
skills.summary: Maps generated UI to approved design tokens and component-library primitives.

skills.name: frontend-state-data-fetch-generator
skills.summary: Generates query caching, mutations, optimistic updates, invalidation, offline state, and error recovery.

skills.name: fullstack-e2e-wiring-generator
skills.summary: Wires frontend, generated SDK, backend, identity, database, messaging, configuration, local composition, and end-to-end journeys.
